SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELINDA MORRISON LIGHTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREKKIE INC. DBA DOSA $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,590.00, THE CONTRACT ENTERED INTO BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT DOES NOT MAKE PLAINTIFF RESPONSIBLE FOR SUPERVISIONS OF THE ELECTRICAL CONTRACTOR. HER DOCUMENTS AND TESTIMONY SUPPORT HER CLAIM THAT THE EC ERRED IN IMPLEMENTING HER DESIGN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anjan Mitra for Appellant/Defendant BREKKIE, INC. DBA DOSA; Melinda Morrison for Respondent/Plaintiff Melinda Morrison Lighting.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Melinda Morrison testifies on behalf of Melinda Morrison Lighting.
Respondent/Plaintiff submits Group Exhibit 1.
Anjan Mitra testifies on behalf of Brekkie, Inc. dba Dosa.
Appelant/Defendant submits Group Exhibit A.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf. Clerk: Craig Blackstone; not reported (Dept. 525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Judgment Entered
